channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Trump offers memecoin holders another gala to boost token from lows
item.description: Donald Trump is billed as the keynote speaker at an event in Florida for his top memecoin holders, which comes as the token hits an all-time low.

item.title: White House Calls for Retraction of ABC Report Over Iran Drone Threat
item.description: Officials say the FBI alert cited by the network came from an unverified tip, as Iran deploys drones across the Middle East following U.S. and Israeli strikes.

item.title: BlackRock’s staked Ethereum ETF sees $15.5M volume on debut
item.description: The iShares Staked Ethereum Trust will distribute staking rewards on a monthly basis from institutional-grade Ethereum validators run by Figment, Galaxy Digital and Attestant.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to near $72,000 after Treasury Secretary Bessent attempts to calm oil fears
item.description: Bessent said the U.S. Treasury Department will provide temporary authorization to allow countries to purchase Russian oil currently in transit.

item.title: Crypto Trader Loses Nearly $50M in Aave Trade, Protocol Offers $600K Fee Refund
item.description: A $50 million USDT trade executed through Aave’s interface returned just 324 AAVE tokens after a user went ahead despite a high-slippage warning.

item.title: Stricter MiCA rules could thin crypto industry across the EU, says Swiss wealth manager
item.description: Crypto wealth manager Swissborg gets MiCA approval and prepares to move its European operations to France while targeting growth in markets including Germany, Italy and Spain.

item.title: Crypto investor turns $50 million into $36,000 in one botched move
item.description: Aave founder Stani Kulechov said the interface displayed multiple slippage warnings, which the user manually accepted on a mobile device.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Google's New AI Tool Predicts Flash Floods Up to 24 Hours in Advance
item.description: Google's Gemini-powered Groundsource AI system mines decades of news reports, powering real-time flash flood warnings in 150 countries.

item.title: US Senate leader doesn‘t expect market structure to pass before April: Report
item.description: Senator John Thune reportedly said that the chamber would prioritize the SAVE America Act before addressing a vote on bipartisan bills like crypto market structure.

item.title: SEC's advisory group backs tokenized securities push, outlines how to keep it safe
item.description: The committee that steers the U.S. securities regulator on investor issues voted to support a new effort to regulate stock transactions on blockchains.

item.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ calls for simpler disclosure rules, flags tokenization debate
item.description: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce urged regulators to simplify corporate disclosure rules and allow experimentation with tokenized securities via a potential innovation exemption.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 US Senate votes to ban a Federal Reserve Central Bank Digital Currency, included in a bipartisan housing bill. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5LX19hckFQZkVJb3RPNHVFbllpd2VJVllGczZrVXZCN1FsREo0RmV0T0FEc1YyaDljaFRscEVQdVNvLVBpTGJMREotd1AzM3F0M3NQZEstcnN6WEhmaVEzdml3?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 US Senate votes t…

item.title: JUST IN: Trader accidentally swaps $50 million $USDT for $36,000 $AAVE on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9pNTZZZndJM1Q5WkI1OU03bThOcDJ4NjdKWUh4ZFdmY3dKcGZDNkJreVZ3UExiUUpMekR6TTFIWC12RjBTYTNyWEpib0Q3MGRyYTNma3MzLVBYZFpET3pYR2tn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Trader accidentally swaps…

item.title: Anchorage Digital ties in Puffer Finance for institutional Ethereum restaking
item.description: The integration allows institutions to stake Ether held in Anchorage custody and receive Puffer’s liquid restaking token while earning staking and restaking rewards.

item.title: OFAC Targets North Korean IT Worker Networks Using Cryptocurrency to Fund WMD Programs
item.description: TL;DR OFAC designated six individuals and two entities for facilitating North Korean IT worker schemes that generated nearly $800 million… The post OFAC Targets North Korean IT Worker Networks Using Cryptocurrency to Fund WMD Programs appe…

item.title: President Trump Is Hosting Another Exclusive Event for Meme Coin Holders
item.description: President Trump's Solana meme coin jumped briefly after the team announced a new exclusive event for top holders.

item.title: Donald Trump to hold another Mar-a-Lago lunch for his token holders
item.description: The U.S. President will be the keynote speaker at a "gala luncheon" for the top 297 holders of the $TRUMP token.

item.title: US Senate votes to include CBDC ban in bipartisan housing bill
item.description: The provision banning the Federal Reserve from issuing a central bank digital currency was included in housing affordability legislation.

item.title: Bitcoin Quantum Threat Is Real But Not Imminent, Says Cathie Wood's Ark Invest
item.description: Researchers say quantum breakthroughs could eventually expose millions in Bitcoin unless the network adopts post-quantum cryptography.

item.title: Binance claims ‘full and complete legal victory‘ in Alabama court
item.description: While a judge granted a motion by Changpeng Zhao, he also ordered the plaintiffs in the case against Binance to file a second complaint or face ”total or partial dismissal.”

item.title: Polychain backs VeryAI’s $10M raise to build palm-scan identity system on Solana
item.description: The startup’s smartphone-based biometric system aims to help crypto platforms detect AI-generated accounts while preserving user privacy through onchain verification.

item.title: Bitcoin funding rate flips negative: Are bears getting too confident?
item.description: While geopolitical tension and weak labor data are hurting market sentiment, institutional buying below $75,000 may soon exhaust sellers and spark a bull run.

item.title: Coinbase execs deny lobbying against Bitcoin de minimis tax exemption
item.description: US lawmakers are eyeing tax exemptions for US dollar stablecoins, which are pegged and do not change in value, but not other cryptocurrencies.

item.title: Nvidia Drops Nemotron 3 Super Amid $26 Billion Open-Model AI Bet—America's Answer to Qwen?
item.description: Nvidia released its most capable open-weight model yet and revealed plans to spend $26 billion over five years building frontier open models—a direct challenge to Chinese AI dominance.

item.title: Crypto accounting startup Cryptio lands $45M as institutions move onchain
item.description: A surge in tokenized finance is driving demand for systems that reconcile blockchain transactions for audits and reporting, pushing digital asset accounting into focus.

item.title: Optimism Team Lays Off 20 Employees Amid Ethereum Scaling Shifts, Base Migration Plans
item.description: Optimism developer OP Labs is letting go of 20 employees to help it narrow focus amid shifts in the broader Ethereum landscape.

item.title: Authorities Freeze $3.5M in Crypto as Europol, DOJ Disrupt ‘SocksEscort’ Proxy Network
item.description: Investigators said the service infected thousands of routers and enabled fraud including crypto account takeovers.

item.title: Stablecoins Have ‘Increasing Relevance’ in Illicit Amazon Gold Trade: GI-TOC
item.description: Illicitly traded gold from the Amazon Basin is increasingly being bought in Venezuela using the USDT stablecoin, according to a new report.

item.title: Bitcoin Is Rising While Bonds and Stocks Struggle—Here's Why
item.description: Bitcoin is beating gold and stocks since the crisis began—and institutions are taking notice.

item.title: Is Bitcoin price at risk if private credit breaks?
item.description: A looming private credit crisis risked triggering liquidity crunches that could initially suppress Bitcoin prices, but Fed interventions may ignite a major BTC rally.

item.title: JPMorgan Sued for Allegedly Enabling $328 Million Crypto 'Ponzi Scheme'
item.description: The lawsuit claims JPMorgan Chase should have done more to prevent a customer from allegedly pulling off a massive crypto fraud.

item.title: Tether joins $5.2M round in stablecoin infrastructure builder Ark Labs
item.description: The funding will support development of a programmable execution layer designed to enable faster issuance and settlement of digital assets on the network.

item.title: CFTC chair opens prediction markets rulemaking to public comment
item.description: “This ends today,“ said CFTC Chair Michael Selig, who has been reiterating his position that the agency has exclusive jurisdiction overseeing prediction markets platforms.

item.title: The Emperor has no wallet
item.description: Why crypto still hasn’t solved a single everyday problem, argues VerifiedX’s Pollak.

item.title: How Alkimi is Fixing the ‘Opaque’ Online Advertising Model With AdFi
item.description: Advertisers spend millions on ads that may never be seen by real people. Alkimi is aiming to make the online advertising market transparent.

item.title: Senate Overwhelmingly Passes CBDC Ban Attached to Bipartisan Housing Bill
item.description: The bill including a CBDC ban still faces a winding road to becoming law, due to obstacles in the House and at the White House.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy is estimated to have bought 2,500 BTC via STRC today 🚀 A new daily record and we're only halfway through the day 🤯 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9DNGxaQUZUNWxBanZfMEtKblNJVUFYNFkyT0tnbFg2Z1psN1p4eFJ2TFVxcHRkdUpoTFB2djEzanBjTkFuRFZwd1c3Q2NqSTZqV0tHejBPaGthODZRWXA4S1FUN0xJOU0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's S…

item.title: BitMine's Tom Lee Joins Eightco Board as ORBS Stock Jumps on $125 Million Fundraise
item.description: Shares in Eightco spiked Thursday after the firm revealed fresh investments from Tom Lee's BitMine and Cathie Wood's Ark Invest.

item.title: WASHINGTON D.C. - Bitcoin Policy Institute releases the following brief on the latest legislative developments on a De Minimis exemption for Bitcoin transactions. We will continue to keep you informed as discussions develop. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1kbjYtVjdmUzJNVm5yWjZhQUdtTFVmWEFjT2JGZ2VjYTZsRHhtRlpSVmZkallEbEhYUmxJbFBaYjB3REpERnZNLW9QYnptTWNWcGxPdndCY0pBU05KNVRPaU9pZWU?oc=5" target="_blank">WASHINGTON D.C. - Bitcoin Polic…

item.title: U.S. Senate votes to ban CBDCs in housing bill that may face trouble in the House
item.description: A bipartisan housing bill was approved in the Senate, carrying an unrelated ban on U.S. central bank digital currencies, but its future remains uncertain.

item.title: Ethereum layer-2 developer OP Labs cuts roles to 'narrow focus'
item.description: The firm plays a central role in the development of Optimism, an Ethereum layer-2 scaling network designed to make transactions faster and cheaper by processing activity off the Ethereum main chain.

item.title: Here is what $100 oil means for Bitcoin network
item.description: Research shows that only 8% to 10% of global Bitcoin hashrate runs in oil-sensitive power markets, suggesting that geopolitical shocks may affect BTC prices more than mining costs.

item.title: Alleged Ponzi scheme victims sue JPMorgan for banking supposed $328 million scam
item.description: The proposed class action suit said Chase provided “the essential banking infrastructure” for Goliath Ventures’ alleged fraud, despite red flags it claims made the scheme “obvious.”

item.title: Bitcoin holds $70,000 level as surging oil prices and credit issues have stocks tumbling
item.description: U.S. President Trump said stopping Iran is more of a concern than oil prices, as crude climbed 10% on Thursday.

item.title: You know there’s a delay between the time we buy the Bitcoin and the time Bitcoin goes to the moon. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE04cldzeDEwYXpHbGhaQXAwX3RVTFlWZFBXZldxZ0lzbkFMbzdMbzBONFRBZzFrVzcwMUlwOC1mdVBVdkEwMDZfY2NOR0xqWEFDMGRqSndIVGRDSVU?oc=5" target="_blank">You know there’s a delay between the time w…

item.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest says quantum computing is a long-term risk for bitcoin, not an imminent threat
item.description: Today’s quantum computers are far from breaking Bitcoin’s cryptography and any real threat would likely emerge gradually, giving the network time to adapt.

item.title: Prediction markets get tailored U.S. guidance from former foe CFTC
item.description: The agency that once fought the events contracts platforms in court has now issued a new policy stance and is proposing permanent rules for oversight.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum should be used as a simple digital bulletin board
item.description: Ethereum’s co-founder wants developers to stop forcing blockchain into every problem and start treating it as a reliable, shared memory for the digital world.

item.title: Circle’s outperformance highlights USDC’s staying power, says bullish Wall Street analyst
item.description: William Blair said Circle’s recent rally reflects more than macro factors, pointing to USDC resilience and growing recognition of the firm’s stablecoin infrastructure advantage.

item.title: Bitcoin catching up to gold hints at an ‘opportunity within risk’
item.description: Bitcoin showed early signs of overtaking gold in the market as new data outlined an opportunity based on historical returns around the US midterm elections.

item.title: Lido launches stablecoin yield product to expand beyond ether
item.description: The goal is to make it easier for users to earn returns on crypto without having to choose or manage strategies themselves.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto accounting; comparing the US and Europe
item.description: Crypto assets defy traditional accounting rules, posing huge risks for auditors and fund managers. Ganna Vitko breaks down U.S. vs EU trends.

item.title: Avalanche’s business chief says crypto must grow up and solve real problems
item.description: John Nahas argues blockchain’s next phase is custom infrastructure for companies, not one-size-fits-all chains chasing hype.

item.title: Tether built an internal Bitcoin dedicated dashboard to help our teams to support Bitcoin adoption and education across the globe 🍊🌍 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE43clV1cmJsbWV5RjIwOTFPZGxWYTJSS0tSbTR5cXR3UHpQQkVRT0ZQc2Q0VzdXdUU2S1FXTmdyTWdMa2k4YS1sWFg1VDRzckhpM3hoUTk5bkh3TUZkZ3dUN2J1RQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Tether built an internal Bitcoin…

item.title: Bitcoin selling intensifies across all wallet sizes despite price holding near $70,000
item.description: Glassnode’s Accumulation Trend Score drops to 0.04 as smaller wallet cohorts offload BTC while macro headwinds intensify.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy is estimated to have already bought over 1,001 bitcoin via STRC since the market opened about 35 minutes ago 🤯🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1FQXoyNDNxZUFEUTZPeVptM3ZsWmZ2aTM2WU91aHYwX0NwT19ISkdMdXZDUTFwd0w4RmY1cTZ2YWtUWHczdVZFUjhiQ3RpMFpfV1p5LWFZMlkxakwyWmpuN2tnWFA2WTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's S…

item.title: Ark Invest sees one-third of Bitcoin supply at risk from quantum threat
item.description: Ark and Unchained say about one-third of the Bitcoin supply remains exposed to future quantum threats, though the risk is still years away.

item.title: Eightco shares jump on $125 million funding commitment, investment in OpenAI, Beast Industries
item.description: Eightco holds a digital asset treasury that includes some 277 million WLD tokens and 11,000 ether.

item.title: Crypto ATM losses surge 33% in 2025 as AI superpowers scams: CertiK
item.description: Crypto ATMs or kiosks are the “lowest-friction extraction channel available to scammers,” said cybersecurity firm CertiK.
